# terrible_cisco_intersight_intersight_server_pool_qualification_policy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name assigned to the Server Pool Qualification Policy. The name must be between 1 and 62 alphanumeric characters, allowing special characters :-_.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `blade_qualifier` (String) Blade qualifier for qualifying blade-based servers.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The user-defined description for the Server Pool Qualification Policy. Description can contain letters(a-z, A-Z), numbers(0-9), hyphen(-), period(.), colon(:), or an underscore(_).
- `domain_qualifier` (String) Domain qualifier for Fabric Interconnect and domain-based qualification.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `gpu_qualifier` (String) GPU qualifier for qualifying servers based on GPU specifications. If not specified, a default GPU qualifier with `servers_without_gpu` evaluation type is automatically added.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `memory_qualifier` (String) Memory qualifier for qualifying servers based on memory specifications.
- `network_adaptor_qualifier` (String) Network adaptor qualifier for qualifying servers based on network adaptor count.
- `organization` (String) The name of the Organization this resource is assigned to. Profiles and Policies that are created within a Custom Organization are applicable only to devices in the same Organization.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `processor_qualifier` (String) Processor qualifier for qualifying servers based on CPU specifications.
- `rack_server_qualifier` (String) Rack server qualifier for qualifying rack-based servers.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) If `present`, will verify the resource is present and will create if needed. If `absent`, will verify the resource is absent and will delete if needed.
- `tag_qualifier` (String) Tag qualifier for qualifying resources based on tags.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `api_response` (String) The API response output returned by the specified resource.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
